title: phlomis herba-venti subsp. herba-venti
intro: Phlomis herba-venti subsp. herba-venti, also known as Herbe-vent, is a subspecies of the Phlomis herba-venti plant, which is a perennial herb belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, including its ability to stimulate digestion, reduce inflammation, and act as an expectorant, helping to relieve respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The health benefits of Phlomis herba-venti subsp. herba-venti include its potential to alleviate symptoms of colds, flu, and sinusitis, as well as its anti-inflammatory properties, which may help to soothe and calm irritated tissues. Herbal preparations of Phlomis herba-venti subsp. herba-venti include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to take advantage of its medicinal properties and health benefits.
